1210001.Name: Hero's Herb Postcard
1210001.DictionaryDes: After the Asterleeds Independence War, Hero's Herb grew in Ancient City of Vill, spreading towards Asterleeds...

1210002.Name: Towering Ruin Postcard
1210002.DictionaryDes: It is said to be a divine ruins left by the Bapharia civilization, standing in the center of Asteria Plains...

1210003.Name: Statue of the Hero Postcard
1210003.DictionaryDes: Many tree carvings were spontaneously built by the people to quietly honor the heroes who brought independence and peace...

1210004.Name: Andra Resting Post Postcard
1210004.DictionaryDes: Built after the war beside the historic Andra Basin battlefield, this resting post now shelters "battlefield scavengers"-solitary figures who search for gear left behind from the Asterleeds Independence War...

1210005.Name: Andra Landing Battlefield Postcard
1210005.DictionaryDes: An untamed and hazardous expanse, once a major battlefield in the Asterleeds Independence War, where wild-growing natural plants coexist harmoniously with war remnants...

1210006.Name: Andra Underground Mines Postcard
1210006.DictionaryDes: Deep within the Andra Basin tunnels, where the Byrnhald's Giant Golem was destroyed during the Asterleeds Independence War-its abandoned energy core continues to trigger dramatic ecological transformations.

1210007.Name: Minsterhorn Postcard
1210007.DictionaryDes: Once a tranquil village, Minsterhorn fell to ruins in the flames of the Asterleeds Independence War. In its quiet aftermath, the surviving villagers returned to reclaim and rebuild their homes...

1210008.Name: Entrance to the Kanamia Tribe Postcard
1210008.DictionaryDes: The Kanamia Tribe lives a simple and kind life through hunting and gathering. They worship their ancestors, referring to them as Ancestral Spirits...

1210009.Name: Elders' Council Hall Postcard
1210009.DictionaryDes: The chieftain and elders of the Kanamia Tribe hold their council meetings entwined around a special eternal tree...

1210010.Name: Ruins of Andra City Postcard
1210010.DictionaryDes: Andra was once a major city of the Bapharia civilization. Destroyed in the chaos of war, it now survives only as ruins...

1210011.Name: Dark Mist Fortress Postcard
1210011.DictionaryDes: The Dark Mist Legion, whose goal is to bring down Asterleeds, has established a secret hideout within the Ruins of Andra City...

1210012.Name: Overlooking Fallen River
1210012.DictionaryDes: Through your eyes, I have reclaimed my childhood once more. —Sasha

1210013.Name: Thunderfall
1210013.DictionaryDes: The birds' chirps are the songs of the stars. —Sasha

1210014.Name: Heavensbane Spire
1210014.DictionaryDes: If there is truly a creator of this world, they must exist above both the Divine and nature. —Julian

1210015.Name: Old Dwelling
1210015.DictionaryDes: This... was once my home. The cliff is dotted with dwellings carved out of the rock, like a beehive. —Sasha

1210016.Name: Fallen River Rock Chamber
1210016.DictionaryDes: Human carvings and the ruins of the Bapharian Divines coexist in this place. —Liam

1210017.Name: Inverted Illusory Bloom
1210017.DictionaryDes: By the grace of the Bapharian Divines! The core is a crystal, but it looks just like a flower! —Liam

1210018.Name: Rock Blooming from a Crevice
1210018.DictionaryDes: It's like these stones just... sprouted from the crevices overnight. —Sasha

1210019.Name: Lallipar
1210019.DictionaryDes: It carries a pleasant scent, like that of dry stones just before a rainfall. —Alida

1210020.Name: Pillar of Divinity
1210020.DictionaryDes: A long, rectangular sanctuary that glitters like a diamond. That's where Daddy works. —Alida

1210021.Name: Mine Crane
1210021.DictionaryDes: On the day I escaped, I stood right here and made a vow. From this day forward, I will live for myself alone! —Owen

1210022.Name: Field of the Forgotten
1210022.DictionaryDes: This was once where we would sneak away to dream. Now, only a drunk like me still remembers. —Owen

1210023.Name: Mine Pass
1210023.DictionaryDes: Walter, Kai, Sylvester, Finn... They remain below, forever. —Owen

1210024.Name: Windmill at the Transport Station
1210024.DictionaryDes: The curve of the windmill fits perfectly within the stark lines of the Garrison Outpost, softening its severe look. —Daisy

1210025.Name: Village by the Rails
1210025.DictionaryDes: How familiar... The smell of earth and rust that belong only to this place. —Daisy

1210026.Name: Steel Beast of the Transport Station
1210026.DictionaryDes: These ugly pipes lead to secrets I have no desire to know. —Daisy

1210027.Name: Garrison Outpost
1210027.DictionaryDes: I shall carry your words with me always: Devote your life to your mission. —Reed

1210028.Name: Upper Mustard Tavern
1210028.DictionaryDes: The specialty here is a bitter drink, but some missions require one before you can begin. —Reed

1210029.Name: Lower Mustard Tavern
1210029.DictionaryDes: Though these miners are covered in grime, deep down, their souls are no different from our own. —Reed

1210030.Name: A Corner of the Transport Station
1210030.DictionaryDes: Each rivet is like a child to me. Seeing them all rock-solid is a dream come true. —Daisy

1210031.Name: Illusory Bloom Under the Pillar of Divinity
1210031.DictionaryDes: Every day, it torments my soul... Why am I the only one who survived? —Brock

1210032.Name: The Mending Mines
1210032.DictionaryDes: This is my first time seeing what lies below... It's so vast and mysterious. —Hendel

1210033.Name: Forget, Then Grow
1210033.DictionaryDes: These strange twigs excite me. Special prey must be lurking in the darkness. —Hendel

1210034.Name: Illusory Bloom in the Underground Mine
1210034.DictionaryDes: Don't get me wrong... It's just my merchant's instinct, wondering what it's worth. —Leo

1210035.Name: Mirage Nappo
1210035.DictionaryDes: There really is a Nappo there! It's a gold mine... Why can't you all see it!? —Leo

1210036.Name: Rails in the Transfer Zone
1210036.DictionaryDes: Father used to say that red ore was the most beautiful color in the world. —Irene

1210037.Name: The Undercity
1210037.DictionaryDes: This is the place... where the Rock Serpent took my father from me. —Irene

1210038.Name: Deep Mining Zone
1210038.DictionaryDes: A craftsman who has spent his life with ore has finally seen its birthplace. —Brooke

1210039.Name: Crystal Storage
1210039.DictionaryDes: I've never come across a mysterious ore like this. I bet it could be used to make all sorts of things! —Brooke

1210040.Name: Nature's Return
1210040.DictionaryDes: Nature is returning... The scars of excessive mining will finally be healed. —Felinx

1210041.Name: Place of Silence
1210041.DictionaryDes: Some truths are meant to be buried deep. Just like this mine, forever silent. —Felinx

1210100.Name: Renewal of the Wolf Totem
1210100.DictionaryDes:
"At the end of this path, all are kin."
May the White Wolf's embrace temper your edge, like the sea accepting flowing rivers.
The Autumn Priest Sentara

1210101.Name: Renewal of the Snake Totem
1210101.DictionaryDes:
"Back then, the Snake clan was the first to rise and fight in the war."
"Just as you did for us during the hurricane."

The serpent's tongue will sense the unseen for you. In every battle, fangs pierce through steel.
Chieftain Rotroani

1210102.Name: Renewal of the Bird Totem
1210102.DictionaryDes:
"Air to the bird is as laughter to life."
May every cliff become a step toward the stars.
Spring Priest Xochitl

1210103.Name: Renewal of the Mirror Totem
1210103.DictionaryDes:
"Weave Dreams to uncover the truth."

The Mirror Totem's insight will become your blade to cut through illusions.
May you see through lies and grasp the truth.
Winter Priest Yecot

1210104.Name: Renewal of the Ram Totem
1210104.DictionaryDes:
"Finally! This is the latest we've ever lit the flame—ouch!"
"Maquill! Quit rambling."

May you face hardship like a ram chewing the cud until resilience is forged into hope.
Quetzal & his apprentice Maquill, who finally memorized his lines

1210105.Name: Renewal of the Pot Totem
1210105.DictionaryDes:
"The rules are Rotroani's, but the meat and fire are ours."
The Renewal here forms a big pot. Its fierce fire can sear dragon meat and soothe fallen souls.

"There's a Goblin Lair nearby... but never mind. Let's just enjoy the festival!"
Former Warrior Necalli

1210106.Name: Postcard: Starland Town
1210106.DictionaryDes: The starting point of all dreams and joy, Wandering Star Town holds countless moments of happiness...

1210107.Name: Postcard: Aurora Stage
1210107.DictionaryDes: Those who love to dance will be drawn to this stage... Let's move to the rhythm together!

1210108.Name: Postcard: Boarlet Waltz
1210108.DictionaryDes: The round, chubby, and utterly adorable Boarlets have become mounts...

1210109.Name: Postcard: Eye of the Tides
1210109.DictionaryDes: A giant Ee-chan and a massive water party DJ booth, sometimes echoing tidal tunes...

1210110.Name: Postcard: Cherry Blossom Forest
1210110.DictionaryDes: The beautiful Cherry Blossom Forest, a place where countless visitors gather to enjoy the scenery...

1210111.Name: Postcard: Star Orbiter
1210111.DictionaryDes: The Star Orbiter's blessing is a hope shared by all.

1210112.Name: Starland Club
1210112.DictionaryDes: A place where victories are decided fairly. Winning or losing at the card table is also a unique way of connecting.

1210113.Name: Starlight - The Overlook
1210113.DictionaryDes: The flowing lights and the cheering crowd are all in full view.

1210114.Name: Heart-Shaped Pond - Not a Wishing Pool
1210114.DictionaryDes: I see... Nice to meet you, I'm Pirlo from the Port District. It's a pleasure. —Pirlo

1210115.Name: West Beach - Vacation Vibes
1210115.DictionaryDes: Sun, sand, and lounge chairs... the perfect vacation vibe!

1210116.Name: Ee-chan Drum Band
1210116.DictionaryDes: Mr. Pirlo, you're a good man. But this lie must end. —Gloria

1210117.Name: Otherworld Signal Receiver!
1210117.DictionaryDes: Every performance on the Aurora Stage is like a fleeting, passionate convergence of different worlds.

1210118.Name: Nappo Minigame Zone - Timely Pay
1210118.DictionaryDes: All Nappos come fully equipped with safety measures, so please play with peace of mind. —Meowlux Merchant Guild

1210119.Name: West Bridge - Parade Track
1210119.DictionaryDes: Welcome aboard the Beep-Beep Express! On this sightseeing vehicle, no one ever gets left behind!

1210120.Name: West Beach - Sea Breeze Secret
1210120.DictionaryDes: The birthplace of Starland's ghost stories—if you want your story in the tabloids, this is the place to be.
